description_long: This is an adult woman dressed in a classic diner waitress uniform, featuring a collared short-sleeve shirt tucked into a knee-length skirt with a tied apron at the waist. She stands upright with arms extended horizontally, as if in a T-pose. Her hair is styled up in a neat bun, secured with a visible hair tie or clip. She wears high-heeled shoes and a bracelet on her left wrist, and her facial features are clearly defined. The uniform and accessories suggest she is ready for work in a service or hospitality setting. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and typical of a mid-20th-century American diner worker.
description: An adult woman in a classic waitress uniform with a collared shirt, skirt, apron, and high heels, standing upright with arms outstretched. Her hair is styled in a bun and she wears a bracelet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, apron, skirt, high heels, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, bun hairstyle, and the apron tied at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, skirt, apron ties, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the side of the skirt and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve collared shirt, knee-length skirt, waist apron, bracelet
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
